Please wire the funds to DEUTDEDB (Deutsche Bank, Germany) by Friday.
The beneficiary bank BIC is BARCGB22 for UK transfers.
Our SWIFT code BNPAFRPP should be used for all EUR payments.
Transfer to CHASUS33 (JPMorgan Chase, New York) with reference 2024-INV-001.
Correspondent bank: CITIUS33 — please include SWIFT in your instructions.
Wire details: SWIFT/BIC: MIDLGB22, sort code 40-02-50, account 31926819.
Recipient SWIFT code is INGBNL2A for Netherlands-based payments.
Please use SWIFT RBOSGB2L when sending GBP from overseas.
BIC: ULSBIE2D — Ulster Bank Ireland, for SEPA transfers.
Bank identifier code: GEBABEBB (BNP Paribas Fortis, Belgium).
International wire: send to COMMPTAT (CBA, Australia) reference INV-9832.
Zengin code and SWIFT MUFGJPJT apply for JPY transfers to Japan.
The SWIFT address for Bank of America is BOFAUS3N.
Wire to HSBC Hong Kong using SWIFT HSBCHKHH for HKD transactions.
Payment instructions: BIC SCBLSGSG (Standard Chartered Singapore).
For EUR remittance, use SOGEFRPP (Société Générale France).
Correspondent: NWBKGB2L (NatWest, United Kingdom).
BIC code is PNBPUS3NNYC (PNC Bank New York branch).
SWIFT ABNAAM2A — ABN AMRO Bank, Amsterdam, for EUR/USD wires.
Sending to IRVTUS3N (BNY Mellon New York) for clearing.
Bank of China BKCHCNBJ for CNY international payments.
Transfer funds to ICICINBB (ICICI Bank India) — USD correspondent.
SWIFT RZOOAT2L — Raiffeisen Bank Austria for EUR transfers.
Nordea Finland NDEAFIHH for SEPA Credit Transfers in EUR.
BIC: UBSWCHZH80A for Swiss franc wires via UBS Switzerland.
